title: Irish Cream Keto Stir Fry
description: A rich keto stir fry featuring Irish cream and a blend of cheeses.
instructions: Melt 1 tablespoon of butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Stir in the Irish cream and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let simmer for 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Stir in the cream cheese until melted and smooth.
Add the shredded cheddar cheese and stir until melted and well combined.
Add the fresh spinach and cook until wilted.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional cheese if desired.
Melt the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter in a small saucepan over low heat.
Stir in the remaining Irish cream and cook until heated through.
Serve the sauce over the top of the stir fry.
